name: union_class_map_extra_key_prefers_map
description: M3d over-claim GUARD: union C{a:int} | map<string,int> with {"a":1,"extra":2}. The class try_cast REJECTS the extra key (strict), but the map try_cast KEEPS it (ObjectToMap, score 1), so try_cast_union returns the MAP with both keys. Without tryCastMap native's lenient pass would wrongly prefer the lower-index class (ExtraKey, also score 1) — this pins the map. want live-captured from BAML final parse.
